visual_description: An older man with gray hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white shirt, is sitting in a dimly lit room. He holds a mobile phone to his right ear with his right hand and appears to be listening intently, with a serious expression on his face. The background shows a wooden shelf with some bowls and other items.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, low tone, giving instructions. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
